patch.value: pm contracts default returns 286 KB / 9612 lines — token catastrophe for agents

Dogfood 2026-05-17: agents calling `pm contracts` with no flag receive 286 KB / 9612 lines of JSON output. Routinely blows context for downstream agents.

Proposal: change default to a compact summary (action names + 1-line description + counts), with `--full` opting into the current dump. Existing flags like `--availability-only`, `--command <name>` should remain. Update contracts contract test + MCP description for pm_contracts to note the default shape.

Acceptance: default output under 4 KB; --full mirrors current behavior; tests cover both projections.
